title: Lesson 251: (Grammar) - but; however; though; nevertheless; still; yet; ev...

intro_cards.title: でも with Question Words: 'Any ~'
intro_cards.body:
でも after a question word creates an 'any-' word — unlimited scope.

Pattern: [question word] + でも

• 何でも食べます。(I'll eat anything.)
• 誰でもいいです。(Anyone is fine.)
• いつでも来てください。(Come anytime.)
• どこでも住めます。(I can live anywhere.)

Contrast with も (with negative):
• 何も食べない (don't eat anything — negative)
• 何でも食べる (eat anything — affirmative)

Note: でも here (any-) is different from でも ('but') — context clarifies.
